title: The Prisoner
content:
All right,
    Go ahead!
    What's in a name?
    I guess I'll be locked into
    As much as I'm locked out of!
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Edna St. Vincent Millay delivers a powerful performance in "The Prisoner"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
